sysevent_email_action.name: Employee Lifecycle - Request Submitted Confirmation
sysevent_email_action.subject: Your ${request_type} Request Has Been Submitted - Employee ID: ${employee_id}

sysevent_email_action.name: Employee Lifecycle - Manager Approval Required
sysevent_email_action.subject: ACTION REQUIRED: Employee ${request_type} Approval Needed - ${employee_full_name}

sysevent_email_action.name: Employee Lifecycle - Request Approved Department Alert
sysevent_email_action.subject: Employee ${request_type} Approved - Department Tasks Assigned

sysevent_email_action.name: Employee Lifecycle - Process Completed Notification
sysevent_email_action.subject: Employee ${request_type} Process COMPLETED - ${employee_full_name}

sysevent_email_action.name: Employee Lifecycle - Request Rejected Notification
sysevent_email_action.subject: Employee ${request_type} Request REJECTED - ${employee_full_name}
